summary: M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 is closed after PR #175 passed CI, was merged, and entered origin/main at d1d5b4485c947ff63d307b0c2210894ab05a42a9. The task delivered the client-side i18n foundation for system, en-US, and zh-CN, including locale-family canonicalization, persisted preference migration, safe localStorage failure handling, Storybook and Playwright coverage, and independent systems/QA R2 acceptance. No Human Gate is active.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main
tests_run.result: Both local main and origin/main resolve to d1d5b4485c947ff63d307b0c2210894ab05a42a9 before closure branch.
Ready candidates are M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.
No whitespace errors in the closure checkpoint.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 CLOSED only after PR #175 passed CI and entered origin/main.
Record M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 as the next dependency-ready candidates.

risks.summary: Full player-mode UI localization and no-debug-string coverage remain downstream responsibilities.
risks.mitigation: Continue with the accepted M7 UI quality task graph after closure enters main.

requested_action: Merge this closure checkpoint to main, synchronize origin/main, run taskctl ready, and start the highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task.
